variables.name: TUDUDI_SESSION_SECRET
variables.description: Secret key for encrypting session data. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 64

variables.name: TUDUDI_USER_EMAIL
variables.description: Email for the default user account

variables.name: TUDUDI_USER_PASSWORD
variables.description: Password for the default user account

variables.name: TUDUDI_INTERNAL_SSL_ENABLED
variables.description: Enable internal SSL (Railway handles HTTPS, set to false)
